title: Practice: task 6
description: Training set with gradual difficulty growth: easy -> medium -> hard.

exercises.title: Чётные в диапазоне
exercises.text: Сколько чётных чисел от 10 до 30 включительно?

exercises.title: Палиндром
exercises.text: Является ли число 12321 палиндромом? Выведите 1 (да) или 0 (нет).
exercises.explanation: Correct answer: 1. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.
hints: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
Check edge cases: minimum and maximum input bounds.
exercises.code_template:
n = 12321
s = str(n)
print(1 if s == s[::-1] else 0)
exercises.hint_after_first_error: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
exercises.full_explanation: Correct answer: 1. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.

exercises.title: Сумма чётных позиций
exercises.text: Дана строка '123456'. Найдите сумму цифр на чётных позициях (2,4,6).
hints: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
Check edge cases: minimum and maximum input bounds.
exercises.code_template:
s = '123456'
total = 0
for i in range(1, len(s), 2):
    total += int(s[i])
print(total)
exercises.hint_after_first_error: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.

exercises.title: Сортировка цифр
exercises.text: Переставьте цифры числа 53142 в порядке возрастания и выведите результат.
exercises.explanation: Correct answer: 12345. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.
hints: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
Check edge cases: minimum and maximum input bounds.
exercises.hint_after_first_error: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
exercises.full_explanation: Correct answer: 12345. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.

exercises.title: Степень тройки
exercises.text: Является ли 729 степенью тройки? Выведите показатель степени или -1.
exercises.explanation: Correct answer: 6. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.
hints: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
Check edge cases: minimum and maximum input bounds.
exercises.code_template:
n = 729
k = 0
while n > 1:
    if n % 3 != 0:
        k = -1
        break
    n //= 3
    k += 1
print(k)
exercises.hint_after_first_error: Split solution into small steps and print intermediate values during debug.
exercises.full_explanation: Correct answer: 6. Rebuild the solution path and verify all constraints.
